title: papaver dubium
intro: Papaver dubium, also known as the yellow poppy or yellow meadow poppy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Papaver dubium include relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to help with respiratory problems and skin conditions. Papaver dubium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, although it's essential to note that its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
